reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio y mala atención un solo playero y trabajan hasta las 23 solo efectivo y no entregan factura

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service and poor attention, only one beach attendant and they work until 11 p.m., cash only, and they don't issue a receipt.

reviews.comment:
Pequeña y modesta. A quedado en una calle interna y angosta del pueblo y es complicado el acceso. Pero cumple un servicio muy necesario para la zona.

(Translated by Google)
Small and modest. It's located on a narrow, internal street in the village, making access difficult. But it provides a much-needed service to the area.
